text.message: Saw that coming a mile away
Just a really good spot. I would have taken it too
Why did u do that or?
I’ll three to one or one for one
I’d trade them but not if he blocking
looks like no wheat this century
A lot of 6s then none and no tens
Only spot i can block him was where I had to move it from
Oh I assumed the ten wheat was good too
I think that was a big issue
i think my 12 is going to clutch it
I think blue is leading then me but I think he pulls away at current rate
y didnt you go tree port?
I mean blue is making sense now I think
Def dont trade he doesnt want me to cut him off
Let’s keep the pace up if possible
Not connecting, just cutting blue off
No brick on anyone I think
I doubt either of us is gonna connect but if he gets past me he will
The saga of this rave is exciting
If I block him he'll cut me off for sure
reds sheep port is working overtime
Don't think im ending with road, just trying to slow blue down
I feel like I barely get cards
Well one of u two need road
unlikely I'll ever use that port
I 7 out three time ins a row
So many trades that no one is ever gonna take
guess my road builder wont do anything
oh i could have done the 4 ore
if u want to donate, i can take road
give the guy on the best ows and 2 knights road
Well I got army for sure
Just waiting to use knight as needed
No one is trading u blue
gonna hit red as a matter of principle
Ya I could be but u are at 9
